name: cognitive-thermals
description: A critical-thinking scaffold that protects human judgement and reduces cognitive offloading.

interface.shortDescription: Protect human judgement while working with AI
interface.longDescription: A five-stage critical-thinking scaffold for consequential work. It helps users calibrate, frame, explore, update and reflect without silently transferring judgement or synthesis to the AI.
defaultPrompt: Help me think through a consequential decision without making it for me.
Stress-test the question I am asking before we analyse it.
Guide me through a bounded after-action reflection.
